frame_eqs_str: a['ob_r']=((1+Math.sin(a['time']))*0.5); a['zmena_x']=bor(above(a['x'], (1-a['delka_x'])), below(a['x'], 0)); a['zmena_y']=bor(above(a['y'], (1-a['delka_y'])), below(a['y'], 0)); a['smer_x']=(((a['zmena_x']*a['smer_x'])*-1)+(a['smer_x']*(1-a['zmena_x']))); a['smer_y']=(((a['zmena_y']*a['smer_y'])*-1)+(a['smer_y']*(1-a['zmena_y']))); a['x']=(a['x']+(a['smer_x']*a['speed_x'])); a['y']=(a['y']+(a['smer_y']*a['speed_y'])); a['wave_x']=(a['x']+(a['delka_x']*0.5)); a['wave_y']=((1-a['y'])-(a['delka_y']*0.5)); a['q1']=a['x']; a['q2']=a['y']; a['q3']=a['delka_x']; a['q4']=a['delka_y'];
pixel_eqs_str: a['action']=(((above(a['x'], a['q1'])*below(a['x'], (a['q1']+a['q3'])))*above(a['y'], a['q2']))*below(a['y'], (a['q2']+a['q4']))); a['neakce_x']=(0.003*Math.sin(a['time'])); a['akce_x']=0; a['neakce_y']=(0.003*Math.sin((2*a['time']))); a['akce_y']=0; a['dx']=((a['action']*a['akce_x'])+((1-a['action'])*a['neakce_x'])); a['dy']=((a['action']*a['akce_y'])+((1-a['action'])*a['neakce_y'])); a['rot']=((0.1*(1-a['action']))+(Math.sin(a['time'])*0.02)); a['zoom']=(0.95+(a['action']*0.05));
